Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Inquisitors]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Inquisitors were cornered in a hive in southern Izyria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Inquisitors typically act as observers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — The Inquisitors are spider-like beings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Inquisitors take groups of prisoners each day.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — The Inquisitors are associated with Ach’magut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Inquisitors have multiple eyes covering every angle.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — Ach'magut's spawn are called Inquisitors and they look like spiders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Inquisitors are described as having spider-like legs and watching from the walls and ceiling through waving stalks.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
